# command-permissions

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders command-permissions attachment events showing permission grants for the session.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewerAttachment.Renderer` "command_permissions" → `CommandPermissionsView`
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/attachment.JsonlViewerAttachment`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/collapsible-card.CollapsibleCard`, `primitives/css/text.Text`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
